---
title: "NanoQuRe Sequencing QC Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone      # Clean, modern, professional theme
    highlight: tango    # Nice code highlighting
    toc: true           # Table of contents
    toc_float: true     # TOC stays on the side as you scroll
    code_folding: hide
params:
  data: NULL
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(NanoQuRe)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}

DT::datatable(sequencing_stats(params$data), caption = 'Table 1: Sequencing Summary Statistics')

```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
DT::datatable(quality_stats(params$data), caption = 'Table 1: Sequencing Summary Quality Statistics')
```


Number of bases of each length sequenced. Mean length and N50 value included. 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_read_lengths(params$data)
```



Cumulative yield of sequencing run, sorted by status. 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_cumulative_yield(params$data)
```

Distribution of reads of every length. 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_quality_distribution(params$data)
```


Average speed of a read travelling through pore. 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_average_speed(params$data)
```


Yield per hour distribution during the sequencing run, sorted by status.

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_seq_throughput(params$data)
```


Number of active channels during the sequencing run. 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_active_channels(params$data)
```
